question.text: An AMC can be terminated by what percentage of unitholders of a scheme?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** AMC can be terminated by majority of the trustees or by 75% of the unitholders of the scheme. **The Trap:** Simple majority (51%) is insufficient; the regulation specifies 75%. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** This high threshold protects the stability of fund management while giving investors a strong voice.
